approach: Bug fix + backfill against cyber-mux issue #60. Additive to the frozen spec-gate suite (no scenario narrowed), so no Clearance. In-session conductor self-asserts the spec gate within an auto-spec leash; deliver + impl gate follow.

why.floor: none — pure additive to a frozen suite (git diff main spec-gate.feature: 44 added, 0 removed; no existing scenario narrowed or rewritten), so the file self-clears and stays @frozen and Clearance never fires; no semver-ceiling breach and no logical Conflict in the suite
why.blast: medium — two shipped gate scripts (check-suite scenario-map binding, check-spec-state use-case coverage) that police every node in the corpus, plus one governance doc and one node README; no behavior removed
why.novelty: low — bug fix closing a silent-skip fail-open plus a backfill of a previously code-only check into the frozen suite; no new autonomy floor, no new contract shape
why.confidence: high — cold sdd-spec-judge ALIGNED true (oracle/builder/architect all PASS), ran the checkers and full suite itself: 154/154 unit tests, check-suite --root and check-spec-state --root clean, diff confirmed pure additive. The one judge finding (a miscited ../spec-format/README.md reference for the Scenario-map concept) was remediated before this gate by repointing to sdd:spec-format-governance where the map format is defined, plus a clarity fix to an ambiguous 'the map' phrase; re-verified green. Twin defect (extractUseCaseScenarioRefs) folded in under the same rule, dogfood-tested. Closes cyber-mux #60.

why.floor: none — code delivers against the frozen suite with no narrowing; the two behaviors the impl-judge flagged as unspecified were specified additively (self-clears, stays @frozen), not removed
why.verification: every one of the 8+2 frozen scenarios has a named passing unit test; 155/155 pass; check-suite --root and check-spec-state --root clean; suite-form OK
why.confidence: high — cold sdd-impl-judge re-derived each scenario's oracle independently and confirmed the mapped test proves it (not a weaker claim), test fixtures share no apparatus with the frozen Givens (clean absorption read). Its sole blocker (two unspecified behaviors in parseScenarioMap) was resolved by adding the missing frozen scenarios + prose + named tests, the exact finding, re-verified green. Self-asserted in-session: remediation was mechanical and precisely scoped to the finding.

note: extractUseCaseScenarioRefs (use-case-coverage twin) still silently skips an EMPTY Scenario cell via 'if (!cell) continue'; this CR scoped the fix to a non-empty-but-un-backticked cell. An empty Scenario cell in a Use Cases table row is a residual fail-open of the same skip-rather-than-fail family (a missing-coverage gap read as covered). Not contradicting any completion claim — the CR's contract explicitly says 'non-empty'.
